name: Facebook Messenger Platform
description: Send and manage messages on Facebook Messenger at scale. Create automated conversations, send rich media attachments, set up get-started buttons, and configure persistent menus to build engaging bot experiences.

capabilities.name: send_message
capabilities.description: Send a text message to a user on Messenger. Specify recipient and message content.

capabilities.name: send_template
capabilities.description: Send structured message templates with buttons, generic templates, and call-to-action elements for rich interactions.

capabilities.name: get_user_profile
capabilities.description: Retrieve user profile information including name, profile picture, locale, and timezone.

capabilities.name: set_get_started
capabilities.description: Configure a get-started button that appears when users first interact with your Messenger bot.

capabilities.name: send_attachment
capabilities.description: Send files, images, audio, or video attachments to users via Messenger.

capabilities.name: set_persistent_menu
capabilities.description: Configure a persistent menu that appears at the bottom of the Messenger chat for quick navigation and commands.
